rationale: The page contains a table detailing the Global Forest Resources Assessment (GFRA) 2025, which is relevant content. The lower half of the page is a large advertisement for a 'Foundation Course General Studies' by Vision IAS. While an advertisement, it contains structured information about a course, which has been extracted as per instructions to include all meaningful text. The classification is 'content' due to the presence of substantive information, but the large advertisement reduces its overall utility, hence a questionQuotaHint of 2.
cleanedText:
1.7. RELATED REPORTS/INDICES IN NEWS
Report/Indices: Global Forest Resources Assessment (GFRA) 2025
Detail:
* Released by: FAO, every 5 years
* This year's edition published during Global Forest Observations Initiative (GFOI) Plenary in Bali, Indonesia.
* GFOI is a flagship programme of the Group on Earth Observations (GEO) (India is a member).
* Key highlights:
* Forests cover 32% of global land area.
* Nearly half of the world's forests are located in tropics, followed by boreal, temperate and subtropical domains.
* Europe has the largest forest area, accounting for 25% of world's total.
* India's Forest Extent: Moved up one rank to 9th position in terms of total forest area globally, accounting for 2% of global forest area; Ranks 5th in terms of rubber plantation.
Foundation Course General Studies
Preliminary and Main Examination 2027
Innovative Classroom Program
* Comprehensive coverage of all important topics for Preliminary Exam, Main Exam, and Essay.
* Special focus on developing understanding of fundamental concepts and building analytical ability.
* Use of technical facilities like animation, PowerPoint, and videos.
* Effort to develop inter-disciplinary understanding.
* Oriented approach for planned preparation.
* Regular class tests and personal evaluation.
* Free Foundation Classes.
* CSAT Classes
* PT 365 Classes
* MAINS 365 Classes
* PT Test Series
* Main Examination Test Series
* Essay Test Series
* CSAT Test Series
* Essay Writing - Style Classes
* Current Affairs Magazine
Note: Online students can watch live video classes of our course on the online platform from their homes. Students can ask their doubts and subject-related questions during the class through the live chat option. They can also note down their doubts and questions and inform our advisor at the Delhi center, and we will answer the questions via phone/mail.
Scan the QR CODE to download VISION IAS app
DELHI: 25 November, 11 AM | 12 January, 11 AM
JAIPUR: 10 December | JODHPUR: 2 December
